chunks.content: export async function exchangeSessionCookie(rawToken: string) { return createSessionFromBearer(rawToken); } export const SESSION_COOKIE_NAME = 'yoink_session';
export async function revokeSessionCookie(sessionId: string) { return archiveSession(sessionId); } export function loadActiveSession(sessionId: string) { return readSessionRecord(sessionId); }
export function verifyBearer(token: string) { return decodeAndValidate(token); } export const TOKEN_CLOCK_SKEW_MS = 30000;
export const DEFAULT_BACKOFF_MS = [100, 250, 500]; export function computeRetryDelay(attempt: number) { return DEFAULT_BACKOFF_MS[attempt] ?? 1000; }
export const CACHE_WARMUP_LIMIT = 25; export async function primeRepositoryCache() { return fillWarmEntries(); }
export const RRF_K = 60; export const PATH_WEIGHT = 0.15; export function blendSignals(keywordHits: unknown[], semanticHits: unknown[]) { return rerankWithFusion(keywordHits, semanticHits); }
export const YOINK_API_BASE_URL = process.env.YOINK_API_BASE_URL ?? 'https://api.acme.test'; export function loadEnvironmentOverrides() { return process.env; }
export function calculateAnnualInvoice(seats: number, pricePerSeat: number) { return seats * pricePerSeat * 12; }
# Authentication Guide Connect GitHub, paste a repository URL, approve access, and add the data source after sign-in completes.
# Deployment Runbook Use this checklist for rollout, smoke tests, rollback, and canary validation during production releases.
# Search Tuning Hybrid retrieval combines semantic search, keyword matching, and reciprocal rank fusion for better discovery.
# Configuration Reference Document the API endpoint override, debug logging, and environment-based settings for local installs.
# Cache Operations Warm repository caches before traffic, inspect stale entries, and clear warmup queues during incidents.
name: Deploy Preview on: pull_request jobs: preview: steps: - uses: acme/cache-restore - run: ./scripts/deploy-preview.sh
name: Release Extension on: push tags: - v* jobs: publish: steps: - uses: acme/publish-extension - run: ./scripts/package-vsix.sh
name: Nightly Index Sync on: schedule: - cron: '0 3 * * *' jobs: sync: steps: - run: ./scripts/sync-index.sh
name: Setup Yoink inputs: apiKey: required: true repoUrlInput: required: true outputs: configPath: description: Generated config path
name: Publish Extension inputs: vsixPath: required: true marketplaceToken: required: true runs: composite
name: Restore Build Cache inputs: CACHE_KEY_INPUT: required: true restorePathInput: required: true runs: composite
